news.title: Review: The Lesson - Films / Reviews - Italy
news.excerpt: Stefano Mordini’s new film is a psychological thriller about gender-based violence which leads us to wonder what’s truth and what’s paranoia

news.title: Red Code Blue and Escape Net shine bright at Latvia’s Lielais Kristaps Awards - Festivals / Awards - Latvia
news.excerpt: Oskars Rupenheits’ drama has taken the top honours, including Best Film and Best Director, while Dzintars Dreibergs’ basketball epic triumphed across major feature categories

news.title: Festival directors back Berlinale chief Tricia Tuttle as reports mention antisemitism code of conduct and new advisory board - Berlinale 2026
news.excerpt: In the past 24 hours, a coalition of 32 festival leaders has publicly supported Tuttle, whilst German media reports indicate she may remain in post under new governance conditions

news.title: The Latin American Critics’ Award for European Films unveils its 20 nominees - Festivals / Awards - Europe/Latin America
news.excerpt: A jury of 35 film critics and journalists from 13 Latin American countries will select three finalists before announcing the winning film at the Guadalajara International Film Festival

news.title: Interview: Alexis Juncosa • Artistic director, Luxembourg City Film Festival - “I like the idea that LuxFilmFest is becoming one of those places where we can reflect collectively on what we do” - Luxembourg 2026
news.excerpt: The artistic director of the Grand Duchy’s renowned gathering discusses the 16th edition’s “Wild, Wild Rose” theme, immersive expansion and the event’s growing role as a European meeting point

news.title: One World Prague to spotlight stories of resistance, generational voices and global crises at its 28th edition - One World Prague 2026
news.excerpt: The Czech human rights festival will showcase 82 documentaries, 16 fiction films and eight VR works across four competitions and eight thematic sections

news.title: Interview: Margherita Ferri • Director of The Boy with Pink Pants - “The solution to bullying lies in education, not only within the family, but also as a society” - Málaga 2026
news.excerpt: The Italian filmmaker discusses her second feature film, which tackles violence and homophobia, as well as her upcoming project that once again explores the anxieties of adolescence

news.title: Nuestra tierra

news.title: #CANNES79 | Park Chan-wook presidirá el jurado
news.excerpt: Park Chan-wook, director de Oldboy, presidirá el jurado del Festival de Cannes. El festival iniciará el 12 de mayo próximo y su premiación será el 23 de mayo. Chan-wook participó previamente del festival con cuatro de sus films integrando la Competencia oficial, Olboy galardonada con el Gran Prem...

news.title: #BERLINALE2026 | Perspectives
news.excerpt: Para juzgar un festival de la dimensión de la Berlinale, es preciso estar físicamente presente (in situ), asistir a las proyecciones, conferencias de prensa y de ser posible participar en entrevistas con actores y realizadores. news.title: Playa de lobos
news.excerpt: EL DUELO QUE NO FUE La consabida co-producción española-argentina, o la unión, sin producción pero si con actores, con el mundo ibérico, es tan fructuosa como errática en su implementación. Ya había ocurrido que películas de la calidad, solidez y premios -como el Oscar en 2010- como fue en su mom...
